columns.description:
Number of equal-width columns or a full CSS `grid-template-columns` value.
Numeric values render as `repeat(<columns>, 1fr)`.

rowGap.description: Row gap override. Wins over `gap` for rows.

columnGap.description: Column gap override. Wins over `gap` for columns.

minItemWidth.description:
Minimum item width for an intrinsic auto-fill grid. When present, this takes
precedence over `columns`.
